summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 16 open PRs. The job explicitly says this is not a dedupe cluster, the hydrated artifact reports no security-sensitive items, and merge/fix/raise_pr/low-signal closeout are disabled. No shared canonical is selected and no mutating actions are planned.

actions.reason: Useful open contributor PR; no duplicate/supersession evidence and no merge/fix action allowed.
Draft feature work should remain independently open; no closure policy condition is met.
Open exec bugfix remains independent; failing checks and dirty merge state block merge/fixed-by-candidate closeout, not classification.
Narrow but still proof-gated open PR; no hydrated duplicate, replacement, or low-signal close authority.
Useful bugfix candidate should remain independently open; dirty branch/proof failure blocks merge, not classification.
Independent channel feature/fix candidate; no duplicate or safe close path is established.
Useful open PR with proof; keep independently open for maintainer review.
Broad failing PR remains independent; closure or fix replacement is not authorized by the job.
Independent session bugfix candidate; dirty branch and failing checks prevent merge/fixed-by-candidate action only.
Independent memory-core candidate with non-main base and proof gap; not closable or mergeable under this job.
Independent Telegram fix candidate; keep open for normal review/proof resolution.
Small independent bugfix candidate; failing checks block merge but not non-mutating classification.
Broad dirty-candidate PR should not be auto-closed in this plan shard; keep independent for maintainer triage.
Independent feature/fix candidate; proof and check failures block merge but not keep classification.
High-signal open PR awaiting author/maintainer follow-up; keep independently open rather than closing or merging in plan mode.
Large independent session recovery candidate with failing checks; no close, fix, or merge path is allowed in this job.
